SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Administrator
Represents an administrator entity in the system handling login and credentials.
AdministratorDAO
Data Access Object interface for managing Administrator entities.
Book
Represents a booking entity containing details about the client, cruise, dates, and prices.
BookDAO
Data Access Object interface for managing Book entities.
ChangePasswordAdminWindow
Dialog that allows changing an administrator password.
Client
Represents a Client interacting with the cruise system.
ClientDAO
Data Access Object interface defining operations for Client entities.
Cruise
Represents a Cruise entity detailing its characteristics and capacity.
CruiseDAO
Data Access Object interface defining operations for Cruise management.
DBImplementationAdministrator
Concrete implementation of AdministratorDAO connecting to a database.
DBImplementationBook
Implementation of the BookDAO interface mapping interactions to a relational database.
DBImplementationClient
Relational database mappings resolving Client logic interactions.
DBImplementationCruise
Concrete implementation mapping Cruise operations to a relational database.
DBImplementationWorker
Database implementation logic for matching Worker processes with a SQL connection.
FormAdminWindow
Dialog to add or modify an Administrator.
FormBookWindow
Dialog that shows a form to create or modify a booking.
FormClientWindow
Dialog that displays a form to add or modify a Client.
FormCruiseWindow
Dialog to add or modify a cruise.
FormWorkerWindow
Modal dialog that shows a form to add or modify a Worker.
ListAdminWindow
Modal dialog that lists administrators and allows adding, deleting and initiating password changes.
ListBookWindow
Modal dialog that lists bookings and provides operations to create, modify and delete bookings.
ListClientWindow
Modal dialog that displays the list of clients and allows adding, modifying and deleting clients.
ListCruiseWindow
Modal dialog that displays the list of cruises and provides operations to add, modify and delete cruises.
ListWorkerWindow
Modal dialog that displays the list of workers in a table and provides operations to add, modify and delete workers.
LoginController
Controller class managing the interactions between the View and the Model (DAO layer) for the cruise booking application.
LoginWindow
Login dialog that prompts for username and password and validates credentials using the provided LoginController.
Main
Entry point of the application.
MainWindow
Main application window that provides access to all management modules, including cruises, workers, clients, administrators, bookings and XML export.
StartWindow
Initial application window that displays a welcome screen.
TestDBImplementationWorker
JUnit 5 test class that validates the CRUD operations and integrity checks of DBImplementationWorker.
TypeCruise
Enumeration defining the different types of cruises.
TypeWorker
Enumeration specifying the roles or services a worker can perform.
Worker
Represents a worker providing services within the cruise system.
WorkerDAO
Data Access Object interface identifying operations for Worker data.
XMLExporter
Utility class responsible for exporting all cruise management data (cruises, workers, clients and bookings) into a structured XML file.
